codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: record-link parsing now only accepts explicit backtick-delimited link strings, and regression coverage proves ordinary colon payloads roundtrip unchanged while true record-link strings still hydrate foreign models.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill still tells workers to run the full services.yaml validation suite before ending the feature, but this worker only ran targeted tests plus fmt/check/clippy and still completed successfully.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl session db16430a-8899-4afc-8058-92cd5ac6d654 shows no cargo test -p appdb --test integration_db -- --test-threads 1, cargo test -p appdb --test sensitive_compile -- --nocapture, or cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads 8 after the edit; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is false.

summary: Pass. The diff cleanly tightens string classification in core/src/lib.rs and adds focused integration coverage in core/tests/integration_db.rs without weakening existing raw string-form record-link hydration.
